GitHub Copilot: follow the project guidance in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root — it is the shared source of truth for architecture, stack, commands, conventions, the Supabase client, secrets handling, and the agent operating protocol. Work is tracked in Linear (team CVS); product docs live in the owner's Obsidian vault (see the Docs policy in AGENTS.md). For repo/infra context use `docs/index.md`.
